items.name: Patchwork Chore Jacket, Vest and Tuxedo Shirt
items.description: Highlighting Polo’s signature pattern play, this utilitarian-inspired chore jacket features a patchwork construction that combines plaid tweed and herringbone pieces. It’s accented by a wide-wale corduroy collar and our woven label at the left pocket. The menswear-inspired vest is carefully crafted with supple leather in a classic construction for season-spanning wear. Cut for a slim fit, it is tailored with welt pockets, slimming waist darts, and an adjustable back belt. Then, the timeless tuxedo elements, such as a pleated front bib and extended barrel cuffs, define this buttoned cotton shirt.

items.name: AahYesHello Computer Shoulder Pet
items.description:
One of the sentinel objects created by the EDM artist AahYesHello in the lore.

AahYesHello or fully known as aahyeshello.zip is an unpacked folder of various files that has
combined made an application for an sentinel AI program that he named AahYesHello. He is
by far the youngest sentinel of the three. The Creator executed the program on his father’s
old computer after finishing aahyeshello.zip. AahYesHello was taught by The Creator on how
to make music by itself on softwares like FL Studio since the program was sentinel. This
grew as interest on AahYesHello very quickly.


Modelled by @Hai_fin

Based of the lore of EDM artist AahYesHello

items.name: Abyssal Wings: Burnished Interstellar Wings
items.description:
Like relics forged in the twilight between stars and shadow, the Burnished Interstellar Wings carry the warm gleam of aged celestial metal. Their rich, dark-golden tones are neither bright nor dull — but perfectly tempered, like something that has weathered aeons in the quiet halls of the cosmos.

Price: 1000/10
Purchase Game: https://www.roblox.com/games/73736600148167
